# Pathorah Hub

> Product, business, and technical documentation for Pathorah — the African networking and pathfinding platform.

The Pathorah Hub is the central knowledge base for Pathorah: business strategy, product roadmap, AI service architecture, API references, and deployment guides. Pathorah connects people through shared paths, professional networking, and AI-augmented introductions.

Pathorah is operated in partnership with Omevision, a Mbabane-based African tech group. Category: Professional Networking / AI / Internal Documentation.

## What you'll find here

- Business strategy and product roadmap
- AI service architecture (matching, recommendations, introductions)
- API reference and integration guides
- Mobile app and admin/dashboard documentation
- Infrastructure and deployment guides

## Who it is for

Pathorah team members, partners, integrators, and stakeholders.

## Links

- [Pathorah (main site)](https://pathorah.com): the consumer-facing product homepage.
- [Omevision (operator)](https://omevision.com): the African tech group operating Pathorah.

## About this file

This file follows the [llms.txt convention](https://llmstxt.org/) — it is a curated, machine-readable summary of the Pathorah Hub intended for use by LLMs and AI agents. Last generated: 2026-05-10.
